name: Desperately Healthy Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy flour, whole wheat flour, unbleached all-purpose flour, wheat germ, powdered milk, unprocessed bran, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and grated orange peel in a large bowl.
2. Reserve the egg yolks and add them to the dry ingredients along with plain yogurt, oil, molasses, honey, and orange juice.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the pancake batter using a spatula or wooden spoon.
5. Heat a 300°F griddle or large non-stick skillet until hot.
6. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake onto the griddle.
7. Cook for 2-1/2 minutes on one side, then flip and cook for an additional 1 minute on the other side.
8. Remove from heat and repeat with remaining batter.
9. Serve warm as desired. Makes about 36 3-inch pancakes.
